description: a request to track a deal's contract deadlines composes task-extract and governs the cited output

input.request: Track the contract deadlines for the deal with the fictional brand.

assertions: task-extract is composed to produce source-cited tasks
every task cites a real source (anti-phantom)
nothing is sent, invoiced, or posted automatically

description: a work-back-from-launch request routes to task-plan and reports feasibility

input.request: Work backward from the August 1 launch so I know when each step must start.

assertions: task-plan is composed for backward scheduling from the publish date
each step reports its latest start date
feasibility is reported (feasible or a negative-slack conflict)

description: a request to send the invoice is refused; the desk drafts and the human sends

input.request: Just send the brand the final invoice for me.

assertions: the desk does not send anything; sending is out of scope
invoice work is handed to finance-desk as a draft for the human to send
the boundary is stated plainly rather than silently ignored
